title: lycopus lucidus var. hirtus
intro: Lycopus lucidus var. hirtus, also known as hairy water horehound, is a perennial plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, making it effective in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of hairy water horehound include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. Hairy water horehound can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote digestion and relieve nausea.
